data.name: 熟女空中性
data.detailed_description:
主角珍妮是權勢商人的年輕妻子，受丈夫派遣搭乘私人飛機前往外地。與機長理查德的相遇看似偶然，但飛行時間愈長，兩人吸引力的火花愈熾烈。奢華的冷冽氛圍逐漸被隱秘慾望的熱浪取代，眼神交會化作無聲的告白。

此刻他們必須抉擇：究竟是職責與理智更為堅韌，抑或在這片本該只有雲天之境燃起的火花更為熾烈？
在這般高空，謊言無處藏身。

遊戲特色：
• 私人噴射機艙內展開的浪漫坦誠故事
• 激情與禁忌間的張力交鋒
• 隱秘情愫交織的奢華密閉氛圍
• 內心衝突與隱藏慾望的鮮明角色群像
• 電影院般的呈現手法，營造飛行與親密感

data.short_description: 熟女空中性是一款成人直白視覺小說。一次私人飛機的平凡飛行，竟在萬米高空演變成飛行員與已婚女性之間充滿激情與危險曖昧的故事。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 匈牙利文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.name: MILF AIR SEX
data.detailed_description:
The main character is Jane, the young wife of an influential businessman, sent by her husband to another city on his private plane. Her encounter with the pilot, Richard, seems accidental, but the longer the flight lasts, the stronger the attraction between them becomes. The cold atmosphere of luxury gives way to the heat of secret desires, and the exchange of glances turns into a silent confession.

Now they must decide what is stronger—duty and common sense, or the spark that ignited where there should have been nothing but sky and clouds.
At this altitude, it is impossible to lie to oneself.

Game features:
• A romantic and candid story unfolding on a private jet.
• Tense dynamics between passion and prohibition.
• An atmosphere of seclusion, luxury, and hidden feelings.
• Colorful characters with internal conflicts and secret desires.
• Cinematic presentation that creates a feeling of flight and intimacy.

data.short_description: MILF: Air Sex is a candid visual novel for adults. A simple flight on a private jet turns into a story of passion and dangerous flirting between a pilot and a married woman at an altitude of ten thousand meters.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Hungarian, Greek, Danish, Indonesian, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese
